channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 27th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Grass needs cutting, 27th March
item.description:
The grass verges need cutting , rubbish and dog mess is not being picked up as the grass is to long .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34,36, Valley Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken blind dumped on pavement outside 157 Herbert Road SE18 3QE opposite 202 Herbert Road., 27th March
item.description:
I reported this fly tipping over three weeks ago but it has not been removed. It is broken venetian blind and could cause someone to trip especially if they are visually impaired. Please can you remove. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 27th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Illegal Parking, 27th March
item.description:
Constant illegal and dangerous parking along The Bourne, Southgate, N14 - (yards from Southgate Circus)! Cars are parked on double yellow lines constantly at all times of the day and night!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southgate Circus, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on the road, 27th March
item.description:
Rubbish strewn across the footpath and road - this is a recurring problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morgan Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th March
item.description:
4 mattresses left on the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Margaret Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers dumped in road, 27th March
item.description:
These barriers have been left in Woodland Terrace, in Charlton, causing an obstruction at the road’s narrowest point.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodland Terrace, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded Kerbside Markings.., 27th March
item.description:
The Bourne (just off Southgate Circus) has recently been resurfaced and the double yellow lines repainted, the kerbside markings however, were not repainted and are almost invisible. These lines need reinstating asap to help eradicate the constant parking problem along this dangerous stretch of road!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bourneside Crescent, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping on Manor Road, 27th March
item.description:
There is constantly fly tipping on Manor Road from the businesses along the stretch from Manor Parade to 12 Manor Road. It is so infuriating as it's clearly the businesses along this road and nothing is being done.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Listria Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped, 27th March
item.description:
Flytipped stuff

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Raleigh Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 8 royal college Street NW1 0TH, 27th March
item.description:
Existing issue : 9186461 Camden coucil said "Both have been reported to their respective owners for them to carry out the remedial works." Can you confirm who the owners are so i can chase them? Is it Thames water?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal College Street, St Pancras, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter along the alleyway, 27th March
item.description:
The alleyway is under neglect as a buildup of litter and weeds

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 295-297, Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent Rubbish Dumping & Resulting Mouse Infestation, 27th March
item.description:
For several weeks, waste has been repeatedly left on the pavement and against our shopfront. This has now led to a mouse infestation inside the premises, causing disruption to operations, posing hygiene risks, and impacting the overall customer experience.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hackney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Table left outside 197b, 27th March
item.description:
A wooden table has appeared outside 197b, along with additional rubbish bags on the wrong day. This happened during the daytime on 25th.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sudrey Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstructions placed in the road between 8-16 wordsworth road, 27th March
item.description:
Obstructions placed in the road between 8-16 wordsworth road se20 7jg large orange cones or other obstructions placed daily an ongoing issue people are now scared to remove them knowing that their car/van will be damaged by slashing tyres etc ongoing issue for the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bycroft Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose kerb stones - trip hazards, 27th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith High Street, North End, Greater London

item.title: Street light blocked by trees, 27th March
item.description:
The streetlight in the path connecting Shortlands Road and Green Close is still blocked by over-growing trees. I first reported this over two months ago.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish and clothes dumped on green outside our house, 27th March
item.description:
Litter clothes and rubbish dumped on our green been here since Wednesday morning would like them removed please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights have been left on continuously for over two years, 27th March
item.description:
Dear Sir or Madam, I am writing to raise a formal complaint regarding the street lighting on the Cossall Estate. The lights have been left on continuously, including during daylight hours, for over two years. This appears to be an ongoing fault that has not been addressed despite the length of time involved. As a leaseholder on the estate, I am concerned that the cost of this unnecessary energy usage may be reflected in service charges, meaning residents could be indirectly paying for an issue that has not been resolved. I would be grateful if you could: Investigate this matter as a priority Confirm who is responsible for the associated costs Provide a clear timeline for resolving the issue If this issue has already been reported, please treat this as a formal escalation. I would also appreciate confirmation of receipt of this complaint and details of the next steps in your complaints process. I look forward to your response.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cossall Walk, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
